in partnership. If the 7th lord is associated with malefic or has malefic aspects then this period
brings difficulties and disasters.
Results of the 8th lord in various bhavas of paribhraman chart
1st bhava: 8th lord in the 1st bhava, brings ill heath, pain and problems for the native. If the 8th is
malefic & makes malefic aspects with the lagnesh, the Sun and the Moon then death, illness and
difficulties are in store for the native. This year portends physical illness and dangers.
2nd bhava : A strong 8th lord in the natal chart gives wealth through a will form the wife.
A weal & afflicted 8th lord brings loss of wealth, theft, robbery, etc. of wealth.
3rd bhava : 8th lord in 3rd bhava brings death of relatives, trouble in travel, expenses & loss of
belongings and also difficulties & troubles due to accidents.
4th bhava : A weak & afflicted 8th lord in 4th bhava gives fall from height, problems to partners,
